creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)

> A quick fix is to sync PORTVERSION (not bump PORTREVISION).

I've synced PORTVERSION of www/node with www/node18.

> Alternatively, PORTVERSION needs to be derived via USES=nodejs because the major version is now controlled by DEFAULT_VERSIONS.

It is more complex. I'll see what I can do.
